# Rebase 4d3c2b1 onto 0a1b2c3 (16 commands)
#
# Commands use both the long form and the single-letter form.
pick a1b2c3d bootstrap repository
p b2c3d4e add README and contributing guide
reword c3d4e5f document release process
r d4e5f6a clarify café setup for Zürich
edit e5f6a7b split parser changes
e f6a7b8c update fixtures before review
squash 07a8b9c fold typo fix into parser commit
s 18b9c0d fold follow-up test cleanup
fixup 29c0d1e correct import ordering
f 3ad1e2f remove temporary debug output
drop 4be2f3a discard generated benchmark data
d 5cf3a4b remove accidental vendor update
exec printf '%s\n' 'checking résumé 🚀'
x test -f Cargo.toml && cargo test -q
break
b

# Unicode commit subjects remain ordinary commit-message text.
pick 6da4b5c localize greeting for 東京
reword 7eb5c6d preserve emoji family 👩‍💻 in changelog
exec name='naïve user'; printf '%s\n' "$name"
x files=$(git diff --name-only HEAD^); test -n "$files"

# Keep this order: the edit and break points are intentional.
# End of basic interactive-rebase fixture.
